description: Profile TFA enable envelope: the one-time two-factor secret, its provisioning expiry, and the save-the-secret warning. The secret is returned to the user by design (it must be confirmed to activate two-factor auth); it is not output-redacted.

input.warning: IMPORTANT: Save this two-factor authentication secret now. It must be confirmed before two-factor authentication is enabled.

canonical.warning: IMPORTANT: Save this two-factor authentication secret now. It must be confirmed before two-factor authentication is enabled.
